title: Funeral of Mara Jade Skywalker
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Event |prev= |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Mara-funeral.jpg]] |name=Funeral of Mara Jade Skywalker |conflict= |date=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] |place=[[Morning Court]], [[New Jedi Temple]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |outcome= |keyparties= |participants=[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]

[[Kyp Durron]] }} {{Quote|We have come to this sacred place to say farewell to our dear friend, to a fierce warrior and a noble dispenser of justice. Mara Jade Skywalker was one of the brightest stars of the Jedi Order, and we will miss her.|[[Saba Sebatyne]]|''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''}} The '''Funeral of Mara Jade Skywalker''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Funeral/Legends|Funeral]] to mark the [[Death/Legends|passing]] of [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]. This ceremony took place in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], approximately one week after [[Skirmish on Kavan|Mara's death]] on [[Kavan]]. The funeral was held in the [[Morning Court]]—a large atrium in the [[New Jedi Temple|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. For the funeral, Mara's body was wrapped in white gauze and set on top of a [[Cremation/Legends|cremation]] pyre. The [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] who attended the funeral all dressed in white robes, and assembled in an area in front of the pyre. The Masters of the [[New Jedi Order|Order]] entered, escorting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his son [[Ben Skywalker]]—who were dressed in gray robes with the hoods pulled over their heads—to the head of the pyre. A large number of government officials and other dignitaries filled the remainder of the space in the Morning Court. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his wife [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] tried to attend the funeral, but were accosted by a [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] squadron, who attempted to arrest them. The two were forced to leave prior to the funeral and escape from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Originally Leia was going to give the eulogy at the funeral, but as she was forced to leave [[Saba Sebatyne]] agreed to give the eulogy instead. Shortly after Master Sebatyne began her eulogy, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] arrived at the funeral - those assembled did not know that he had killed Mara and as a result became the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Caedus]]. His arrival created a stir at the funeral, and he had the Masters upset by taking a place next to Luke and Ben Skywalker. The Masters felt that he should either stand with the other Jedi, or if he was present as a government official to take his place with the other dignitaries. Luke intervened, and allowed Jacen to stand with him and Ben as family. Master Sebatyne resumed her eulogy, turning it in to a message about the dangers of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. While Master Sebatyne was speaking, Mara's body began to disappear, and by the time she had finished Mara's body had returned to the Force. Master Sebatyne led the assembly in reciting the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]. Jacen left soon after the eulogy was finished while many of the other participants gathered for a remembrance feast in the [[Hall of Peace]].''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' ==Guests== *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] (unable to attend) *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] (unable to attend) *[[Ben Skywalker]] *[[Saba Sebatyne]] *[[Kenth Hamner]] *[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] *[[Kyp Durron]] *[[Tenel Ka Djo]] *[[Tesar Sebatyne]] *[[Lowbacca]] *[[Tahiri Veila]] *[[Cha Niathal]] *[[Cilghal]] *[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] *[[Kyle Katarn]] *[[Streen]]This character was not mentioned in the novel as attending, but appeared in the image in [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *[[Octa Ramis]] *[[Cha Niathal]] with her [[Galactic Alliance High Command]] *most of [[Galactic Alliance Senate]] ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Vortex (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] {{1stID|Funeral of Mara Jade Skywalker}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Dramatis Personae]]'' {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Funeral de Mara Jade Skywalker |pt=Funeral de Mara Jade Skywalker }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Mara Jade Skywalker, Funeral of}} [[Category:Events during the Second Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Jedi funerals|Skywalker, Mara Jade]]
